umm.digiquilt.xmlsaveload.handlers
Class DigiQuiltSAXHandler

java.lang.Object

ContentHandler, DTDHandler, EntityResolver, ErrorHandler
public class DigiQuiltSAXHandler
extends DelegatingHandler

Method Detail

getCurrentBlock

public Block getCurrentBlock()
Returns:
the block marked "current" in the save file.

getCurrentGrid

public Grid getCurrentGrid()
Returns:
the grid from the save file.

getNotes

public String getNotes()
Returns:
the notes saved in the file.

getChallenge

public Challenge getChallenge()
Returns:
the challenge saved in the file.

getUndoRedoStack

public UndoRedoStack getUndoRedoStack()
Returns:
the UndoRedoStack as loaded from the file.

                         Attributes attributes)

startElement in interface ContentHandler

childFinished

public void childFinished(Object o)
Description copied from class: DelegatingHandler
Children of MultiEventHandlers can use this method to pass Objects back up to their parents. The parent is responsible for remembering what it delegated to so that it knows what to expect.

Specified by:
childFinished in class DelegatingHandler
Parameters:
o - the Object that the child wishes to pass to the parent.

getStudent

public String getStudent()
Returns:
the student name.

getBlockName

public String getBlockName()
Returns:
the block name

getTimestamp

public long getTimestamp()
Returns:
the timestamp from inside the file
